message:
feat(openapi): add comprehensive validation constraints to schema

Extend PrimitiveSchema with OpenAPI 3.1 validation keywords:
- exclusive_minimum/exclusive_maximum: Exclusive range bounds (> / <)
- min_length/max_length: String length constraints
- pattern: Regex pattern validation for strings
- Update serde attributes with proper camelCase renaming

Update Schema::enum_string() to initialize new constraint fields

Extend route.rs with improved route macro generation
Extend openapi.rs with validation constraint handling

These additions enable full OpenAPI 3.1 schema validation support,
allowing route handlers to express precise input constraints that
are reflected in generated API documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -160,6 +160,11 @@ fn generate_type_schema(ty: &Type, attrs: &SchemaAttrs) -> TokenStream2 {
                 nullable: #nullable,
                 minimum: None,
                 maximum: None,
+                exclusive_minimum: None,
+                exclusive_maximum: None,
+                min_length: None,
+                max_length: None,
+                pattern: None,
                 enum_values: None,
             })
         };
@@ -300,6 +305,11 @@ fn generate_variant_schema(variant: &Variant) -> TokenStream2 {
                     nullable: false,
                     minimum: None,
                     maximum: None,
+                    exclusive_minimum: None,
+                    exclusive_maximum: None,
+                    min_length: None,
+                    max_length: None,
+                    pattern: None,
                     enum_values: Some(vec![#variant_name.to_string()]),
                 })
             }
